messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-488 — Board id-extraction is leading-token-only: a role-held ticket whose handoff header doesn't lead with the id reads as a durable false not-started
What it solves: ORIGIN — BL-474 audit finding #3. A real, latent tracking-defect path where a genuinely-held ticket reads
as not-started on the board, indistinguishable from a legitimately-un-dequeued one.
Approval context: Clear latent tracking-defect fix mandated by BL-474; new feature file, so flagging for review. FIRM: the extractor resolves the first ticket-id-shaped token in a handoff header regardless of leading position (deterministic first-id-wins, still upper-cased), and a header with no id token resolves to…
BL-488 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-488" (or "reject BL-488 <reason>") to act.
